name: YC Founder Operating System
description: Gary Tan–style CEO bundle — a chief-of-staff orchestrator plus a review panel (plan, engineering, design) and an auto-planner that runs your entire day.

integrations.description: Plan the day, block deep work, and triage meetings
Triage inbox, summarize threads, and draft replies
Store briefs, decision log, and review notes
Broadcast daily priorities and review notes to the team
Track initiatives, OKRs, and weekly commitments
